name: Dexketoprofen
description: Dexketoprofen is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug. It is available in the various countries in Europe and Latin America.
indication: For short-term treatment of mild to moderate pain, including dysmenorrhoea.

interactions.name: Salicylic acid
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Salicylic acid is combined with Dexketoprofen.
